case_title: STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT. vs. JOHNSON, RICKY L.

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHNSON, RICKY L. $1,255.30 PRINCIPAL, $98.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,353.30
